title.label: Lesson Title
title.note: Enter a descriptive title for the lesson

description.label: Lesson Description
description.note: Provide a brief description of the lesson
description.placeholder: e.g., This lesson covers the basics of programming using Python.

learningOutcome.label: Learning Outcome
learningOutcome.note: Describe what students will learn after completing the lesson
learningOutcome.placeholder: e.g., Students will understand basic programming concepts and be able to write simple programs.

requirement.label: Requirement
requirement.note: Describe the prerequisites needed to complete the lesson
requirement.placeholder: e.g., Students should have basic programming knowledge before attending this lesson.

topic.label: Topics
topic.note: Select the topics this course belongs to

skill.label: Skills
skill.note: Select the skills this course will help develop

standard.label: Standards
standard.note: Select the education standards this course aligns with

ageRange.label: Age Range
ageRange.note: Select the age range this course is suitable for

courseNotFound.title: Course not found
courseNotFound.description: You need to select a course before creating a lesson.
